历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin were approximately 9985, 9768, 11323, 6808, and 6375 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (11323), but in 2024–2025, it moved forward significantly for two consecutive years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 4948; the baseline ranking in 2025 is about 6375, the highest in the past five years; the university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin was 19 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 19, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, providing no direct relief to the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking (combined with the main campus) is about 80th in 2026, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (a student was expelled for plagiarizing others' works in a competition), which has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; the reputation in 2025 was also somewhat negative (the admission scores for popular majors plummeted); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th, rated as "average", with low short video exposure. Historical abnormal admission records show that in 2025, the admission scores for popular majors at this university plummeted, and some majors had no applicants, but this is a low-attention signal; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) shares discipline evaluations with the main campus, with Management Science and Engineering rated A, the only A- or above discipline; mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors are traditional advantageous directions, attracting some applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication, and other engineering majors continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024); mechanical/intelligent manufacturing majors have divergent popularity. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 2025 (71,938), an increase of about 14%, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, with only 19 enrollment spots in Tianjin, a relatively small proportion; Tianjin candidates' willingness to apply for out-of-province 211 engineering universities has shown an increasing trend in recent years, as evidenced by the consecutive forward shifts in rankings in 2024–2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of significant forward shifts in historical rankings for two consecutive years, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin candidates leading to intensified competition, and the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation on application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 6375, competition is expected to continue intensifying, with rankings moving further forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6345, with a range of 5845–6845.
